Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To Apr-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard S. Price, via Zoom, for and with James A. Rodriguez, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel reports of not having any additional information to report as to Denny Campbell's issues. The court advises that it is ready to grant the instant petition but instructs counsel to continue search efforts for Mr. Campbell's alleged surviving issues prior to final distribution. The court confirms that no one has appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The holographic will dated Jul-18-2015 is admitted to probate. James A. Rodriguez is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-06-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
